metadata.description: Primary references for safe refactoring, legacy code characterization tests, and CI quality gates. AI sources are optional.

refactoring_foundations.name: Martin Fowler - Refactoring (Book)
refactoring_foundations.description: Canonical refactoring reference and catalog entry point.

refactoring_foundations.name: Refactoring.Guru - Refactoring Catalog
refactoring_foundations.description: Refactoring patterns with examples; useful for mapping smells to moves.

refactoring_foundations.name: Refactoring.Guru - Code Smells
refactoring_foundations.description: Code smell identification and remediation hints.

legacy_code_safety.name: Michael Feathers - Characterization Testing
legacy_code_safety.description: Core technique for adding a safety net before refactoring legacy code.

legacy_code_safety.name: Martin Fowler - Strangler Fig Application
legacy_code_safety.description: Incremental modernization pattern for legacy systems.

legacy_code_safety.name: Working Effectively with Legacy Code (Book)
legacy_code_safety.description: Seams, characterization tests, and incremental refactoring strategies.

legacy_code_safety.name: 2026 Legacy Modernization Report
legacy_code_safety.description: Industry research on AI-driven modernization, characterization testing trends, and enterprise migration patterns.

quality_gates.name: ESLint Documentation
quality_gates.description: Lint rules and configuration for JavaScript/TypeScript quality gates.

quality_gates.name: Prettier Documentation
quality_gates.description: Code formatting to reduce diff noise and review friction.

quality_gates.name: SonarQube Server 2025 LTA - Quality Gates
quality_gates.description: Latest 2025 LTA quality gate configuration including Sonar way for AI Code.

technical_debt.name: Gartner - Technical Debt Management
technical_debt.description: Analyst recommendations for structured debt reduction and portfolio management.

technical_debt.name: TechDebt 2026 Conference
technical_debt.description: Academic and industry research on technical debt identification and management strategies.

ci_workflows.name: GitHub Actions - Automating Builds and Tests
ci_workflows.description: CI workflow building blocks (matrices, caching) for refactor safety.

optional_ai_automation.name: GitHub Copilot
optional_ai_automation.description: Optional: AI-assisted refactor suggestions; require tests/contracts to prove behavior preservation.

optional_ai_automation.name: JetBrains AI
optional_ai_automation.description: Optional: IDE assistance for refactors; treat as a draft generator, not an oracle.

optional_ai_automation.name: Qodo (CodiumAI)
optional_ai_automation.description: Optional: AI-driven code integrity with test-driven refactoring and multi-language support.
